title: The Fifth Element
tmdbOverview: In 2257, a taxi driver is unintentionally given the task of saving a young girl who is part of the key that will ensure the survival of humanity.
synopsis: The Fifth Element (1997) is a science fiction, action and adventure film from France. It holds a solid 7.6 rating on IMDb. It's one of the titles we feature across our 1990s and genre rankings. It carries a PG-13 certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
